nl query: What are the ADRs of Sunitinib in human
decompose: drugs[filter]:"Sunitinib"; effects[question]:"ADRs"; species[filter]:"human"
translate: MATCH drugsFuzzy="Sunitinib*"; MATCH species="Human"; question:effects
aggregate: AND[ drugsFuzzy="Sunitinib*", species="Human" ] | facets=[effects] | displayColumns=[drugsFuzzy, species, effects]
